fields.Name: Session Established
fields.Description: A user session was established by successfully validating an authentication token. Written once per session (deduped by issuer+sub+iat) across all auth providers (Auth0, MSAL, magic-link, etc.) by the MJServer token-validation hook. Details JSON carries the issuing provider, sub, iat, IP address, user-agent, origin, and endpoint.

fields.Name: Login Failed
fields.Description: An authentication attempt failed during token validation (invalid token, unknown/inactive user, unsupported issuer). Written by the MJServer token-validation hook and attributed to the system user; the attempted identity (sub/email), failure reason, IP, and user-agent are recorded in the Details JSON. Surfaces token scanning / brute-force.
